events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Sao Tome and Principe; first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (resident in Libreville, Gabon) presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Andrew Lee Steigman, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1975-12-11. Credentials presented: 1976-02-14. Left Libreville 1977-08-21.
